headline: Dominik Szoboszlai
body: 🚨🔐 Dominik Szoboszlai’s new contract at Liverpool has been signed today. All done. Agreement until June 2031, Szoboszlai will enter LFC top earners and official statement will follow soon.
raw_text:
🚨🔐 Dominik Szoboszlai’s new contract at Liverpool has been signed today. All done.

Agreement until June 2031, Szoboszlai will enter #LFC top earners and official statement will follow soon.
